role: The studio design-review region that composes the Rail, Stage, and RhmPanel primitives and binds the review locus to the backend corpus.
capabilities: Auto-select first reviewable mockup and bind its address when corpus loads
Resolve missing address for an already-open mockup from the corpus row (deep-link fix)
Render the three-pane studio shell via StudioKit primitives
Supply title lookup for the Stage from corpus metadata
substance_why: It implements real mount/corpus effects, locus-binding logic, a title resolver, and wires the three studio regions together.
interactions_present: Automatic selection/binding of first reviewable mockup on corpus load
Automatic address backfill for an open mockup from corpus metadata
Title resolution callback passed to Stage
interactions_missing: Explicit user click/select handling for Rail cards (delegated to StudioKit, not visible here)
Loading and error states for corpus fetch
Manual override or reset of auto-selected locus
Handling when no corpus item has an address
URL synchronization logic beyond the deep-link fix described in comments
performance_risks: ESLint-disabled exhaustive-deps in both useEffect hooks can cause stale closures or missed updates
titleFor callback recreated each render and passed to Stage, risking unnecessary child re-renders
refreshCorpus is fire-and-forget with no cancellation or loading tracking
Array.find in titleFor runs on every Stage render without memoization
reuse_why: Preserve the corpus-driven locus-binding rules and deep-link address resolution, but rebuild the shell composition and fix effect dependencies/loading states.
decomposition_hints: Extract locus initialization and address-binding effects into a dedicated useReviewLocus hook
Move titleFor corpus lookup to a shared corpus utilities module
Keep Review.tsx as a thin shell orchestrator composing StudioKit primitives
